creator: tamelingdaniel@gmail.com
text:
This is in accordance with the specification. It says: "The omp_get_num_threads routine returns the number of threads in the team that is executing the parallel region to which the routine region binds. If called from the sequential part of a program, this routine returns 1."

See also https://stackoverflow.com/questions/8969748/set-number-of-threads-using-omp-set-num-threads-to-2-but-omp-get-num-threads for a similar discussion.
